title: Add Almost! Near-Miss Feedback
description: When ≥75% rows pass, show 'So close! Just N row(s) off' with the failing row highlighted.

changes.what: Near-miss feedback already implemented in runSimulation(). The block at passCount/total >= 0.75 already shows 'Almost!' message and failing rows. Already done in existing code.
#result-display.almost style already exists with orange/yellow coloring. Already done.

acceptance: ≥75% rows pass → result display shows 'Almost!' with count of failing rows
Status bar shows which specific rows failed
Styling uses orange/yellow (distinct from pass green and fail red)
notes: This item appears to already be fully implemented in the existing codebase. Verify and confirm.
